name: Europlasma S.A.
summary: Europlasma S.A., together with its subsidiaries, engages in developing, constructing, and operating applications of the plasma in France. The company provides renewable energies and asbestos waste treatment activities. The company provides plasma solutions for gas and hazardous wastes; and produces electricity from waste and biomass gasification. Europlasma S.A. was founded in 1992 and is based in Pessac, France.
